_comment: v15-Branch A: Stronger Adaptive Pondering. Hypothesis: v14-B confirmed Branch B (vocab geometry was the v13 bottleneck) and produced the cleanest output yet, but avg_ponder still pegs at 3.00 — the cap. The halt gate isn't engaging the adaptive-compute lever. Branch A lifts the cap and lowers the cost so the gate has reason to ponder longer on harder tokens. Single-variable change pair (coupled): MAX_PONDER 3 → 5 in engram_model.py, ponder_cost 0.05 → 0.02 in ingest.py. Brain warm-started from v14-B; freeze disabled (Branch A is not isolating vocab). All other hyperparameters frozen at v14-B values: vocab learnable, INV_TEMPERATURE=30.
